exampleContent.sectionSubtitle: Real prompts and articles from this template

prompts.title: Example Action Prompts
prompts.subtitle: Practical tasks to move your student loan strategy forward
items: Gather all your student loan documents and create a comprehensive inventory of your loans
Calculate your total monthly income and create a detailed budget that includes your student loan payments
Research and compare all available federal student loan repayment plans to identify which options match your financial situation
Determine your eligibility for Public Service Loan Forgiveness (PSLF) or other loan forgiveness programs
Contact each of your loan servicers to verify your account details and understand their specific policies and procedures
Download and review your credit report to understand how your student loans impact your credit score and overall financial health
